landing.title: Community Platform
landing.subtitle: Built for structured communities.
landing.fallbackText: Landing page is not published yet.

auth.loginDescription: Use your Discord account to access member features.
auth.sessionRequired: You must be logged in to access this area.

errors.not_guild_member: You must be a member of the Discord server to log in.
errors.missing_required_role: You do not have the required Discord role to log in.
errors.auto_login_not_configured: Auto-login is not properly configured. Please contact an administrator.

dashboard.title: Member Dashboard
dashboard.description: This is your authenticated member area.
dashboard.profileCardSubtitle: Starting point for day-to-day internal tasks

members.title: Members and Profiles
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or Discord ID
members.detailsPlaceholder: Additional member details are shown here.

profile.title: Profile
profile.noSelectableDiscordRoles: Discord roles are currently unavailable for self-assignment.

discordSyncWarning.missingPermissions: Discord nickname could not be updated: bot is missing permissions.
discordSyncWarning.memberNotManageable: Discord nickname could not be updated: member is above the bot role.
discordSyncWarning.nicknameTooLong: Discord nickname could not be updated: name exceeds 32 characters.
discordSyncWarning.generic: Discord nickname could not be updated.

botErrors.missingDiscordId: No Discord ID was found for this account.
botErrors.invalidRoleSelection: Selected Discord roles are invalid or no longer editable.

profile.avatarHint: A custom image replaces your Discord avatar only here in the Hub. Your Discord avatar stays unchanged.
profile.avatarInvalidType: Only PNG, JPEG, WebP, and GIF are supported.

admin.title: Admin Area
admin.description: Only admins can access this area.

moderation.title: Moderation Area
moderation.description: Moderators and admins can access this area.

roles.formDescription: Maintain name, permissions, and description in a structured form layout.
roles.nameHelp: Keep names short and clear so roles are easy to identify in lists and filters.
roles.descriptionHelp: Optional multiline text field for internal notes (max 250 characters).
roles.permissionRoleHelp: Controls the effective permissions of this community role.
roles.nameTooltip: Role name is shown in moderation tables and filter options.
roles.descriptionTooltip: Use description to capture purpose, audience, or usage context.
roles.permissionRoleTooltip: This selection defines the permission scope for users in this role.
roles.sortOrderTooltip: Use values like 10, 20, 30 to leave room for future insertions.

users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or Discord ID

confirm.deleteRoleMessage: Do you really want to delete this role?
confirm.changeRoleMessage: Do you want to apply this role change?

devRoleSwitcher.title: DEV
devRoleSwitcher.description: Dev-only: switch the active session to another user.
devRoleSwitcher.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, user id, or Discord id

adminTheme.title: Design
adminTheme.logoRecommendations: Recommendation: SVG or transparent PNG, square format, ideally 512x512 px, maximum 1 MB. The system displays it as a circle in the sidebar.
adminTheme.logoUnsupportedType: Unsupported file type. Allowed: SVG, PNG, WEBP, JPEG.
adminTheme.logoTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum size is 1 MB.
adminTheme.logoReadError: Could not read the logo file.

adminApps.title: App management
adminApps.description: Manage installed apps and sideload new apps using a GitHub link.
adminApps.directActivateDescription: App will be set to active immediately after install.
adminApps.markVerifiedDescription: Mark this app as verified by the community admin.
adminApps.allowedSources: Only GitHub and raw.githubusercontent.com links are accepted.
adminApps.sideloadError: Sideload failed. Please check the URL and try again.
adminApps.localSideloadSuccess: App installed successfully from local path.
adminApps.localPathHint: You can also enter an absolute local path (e.g. /path/to/my-app) to install directly from disk.
adminApps.sideloadPageDescription: Install apps from a GitHub repository URL or a local path.

adminDiscordRoles.title: Community Settings
adminDiscordRoles.description: Set the community name (shown in the sidebar) and define which Discord roles users can self-manage on their profile.
adminDiscordRoles.helperText: Only editable roles can be released.
adminDiscordRoles.superadminDescription: Re-import your own profile and full Discord role snapshot immediately.
adminDiscordRoles.communityNameDescription: Shown in the sidebar next to the logo.
adminDiscordRoles.discordInviteCodeDescription: The invite code from your Discord invite link (e.g. abc123 from discord.gg/abc123). Shown as a join button on the landing page.

botErrors.missingPayload: Discord bridge request payload is incomplete.
botErrors.invalidRoleSelection: Selected Discord roles are invalid or not editable.

roleGroups.title: Role Groups
roleGroups.description: Group selectable roles and deploy them as button embeds in Discord channels.
roleGroups.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this group? The Discord embed will also be removed.
roleGroups.groupDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional description shown in the embed
roleGroups.noRolesAssigned: No roles assigned to this group.

landingEditor.title: Landing page
landingEditor.description: Manage the content, layout, and design of your landing page.
landingEditor.removeBlockConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this block?
landingEditor.resetConfirm: This will reset all sections to the template defaults. This action cannot be undone.
landingEditor.noSections: No sections yet. Add a block to get started.

adminPermissions.title: Permissions & User Sync
adminPermissions.description: Community roles are mapped to Discord roles and permission roles. The import syncs all mapped roles globally.

roles.newRoleDescription: Define the name, description, and technical mapping in one step.
roles.selectRoleToEditHelp: Choose a community role from the list; the edit form appears below.
roles.noRolesYet: No community roles yet. Create a new role first.
roles.nameHelp: Keep it short and clear so moderators and members can identify it immediately.
roles.permissionRoleHelp: Defines the effective app permissions for this community role.
roles.discordRoleHelp: Optional Discord role for sync. Leave empty if no mapping is needed.
roles.sortOrderHelp: Lower value = appears earlier in lists and selection fields.
roles.nameTooltip: This name appears in filters, tables, and selection lists.
roles.descriptionTooltip: Description helps the team keep role semantics consistent.
roles.permissionRoleTooltip: This mapping is security-relevant and controls access level in the app.
roles.discordRoleTooltip: When set, this Discord role is considered during sync operations.
roles.sortOrderTooltip: Use wide steps (e.g. 10, 20, 30) to keep room for later inserts.
roles.deleteConfirmMessage: Do you really want to delete this community role?

landing.title: Page access
landing.description: Admin and superadmin always keep access. Control who can edit the landing page content and access the Apps area.
landing.allowModeratorAccess: Allow moderators to edit landing page content
landing.allowModeratorAppsAccess: Allow moderators to access the Apps area

import.title: Global User Import
import.missingMapping: At least one community role needs a Discord role mapping.

removeUsers.title: Remove Users
removeUsers.removeDiscordRoles: When deleting a single user, remove all removable Discord roles
removeUsers.bulkRolePlaceholder: Select community role for bulk deletion
removeUsers.deleteByRole: Process all users in this community role

dev.title: Dev Danger Zone
dev.description: Deletes all mirrored non-superadmin user data from the database.

applications.flowsDescription: Create and manage application flows for your community.
applications.applyExpired: This link has expired. Please go back to Discord and click the button again to get a new link.
applications.applySuccess: Your application has been submitted successfully!
applications.applySuccessHint: You will be notified about the status of your application. You can close this page now.

warnings.invalidGraph: Flow graph has structural issues. Edit the flow to fix them.
warnings.missingChannelId: No Discord channel configured. Set it in flow settings.
warnings.missingTokenSecret: APPLICATION_TOKEN_SECRET environment variable is not set.
warnings.missingHubUrl: HUB_URL environment variable is not set.

toolbar.confirmDiscard: All unpublished changes will be lost. Are you sure?

simpleMode.deleteSectionConfirm: Delete this section and all its fields?
simpleMode.emptySection: No fields yet. Add your first field.

modeSwitch.incompatible: This flow contains branches or advanced elements that are not supported in Simple Mode. Remove them in the Advanced editor to switch back.

modeToggle.title: Editor Modes
modeToggle.description: Switch between Simple (linear form) and Advanced (visual graph) mode. Simple is perfect for straightforward application forms.

sectionTitle.title: Sections
sectionTitle.description: Your form is organized in sections. Click a section title to rename it.

addField.title: Add Fields
addField.description: Click here to add a new field to your section. Choose from text inputs, selections, file uploads, and more.

dragDrop.title: Reorder Fields
dragDrop.description: Drag the handle to reorder fields within a section.

publish.title: Publish Changes
publish.description: Your changes are auto-saved as drafts. Click Publish to make them live.

modeToggle.title: Editor Modes
modeToggle.description: You are in the Advanced editor. Switch to Simple mode for linear forms without branching.

nodePalette.title: Node Palette
nodePalette.description: Drag nodes from here onto the canvas to build your flow. Use input fields, info blocks, branches, and more.

canvas.title: Flow Canvas
canvas.description: Connect nodes by dragging from one handle to another. Use conditional branches for complex flows.

publish.title: Save & Publish
publish.description: Changes are auto-saved as drafts. Publish to make your flow active.

sidebar.label: Label
sidebar.noBranchableNodes: No input nodes with options found. Add a radio, dropdown, multi-select, or yes/no input first.
sidebar.selectSourceFirst: Select a source node above to populate branches.
sidebar.noDisplayNameTemplate: No display name template configured. Please configure it in Community Settings first.

detail.previousApplications: This user has applied before ({count} previous application(s)).
detail.roleAssignmentFailed: Roles could not be automatically assigned.

settings.name: Name
settings.rolesDescription: Select Discord roles to assign or remove on submission and approval.
settings.displayNameDescription: Compose the display name from Display Name fields. Use {'{field-id}'} syntax.
settings.displayNameCommunityManaged: Display name fields are now managed at the community level.
settings.ephemeralConfirmationPlaceholder: Click the button below to open the application form.
settings.dmToModeratorsPlaceholder: A new application has been submitted.
settings.ticketDescription: Optionally create a Discord channel or thread for each applicant to communicate with moderators.
settings.ticketAccessRolesHint: Roles that get read/write access to the ticket besides the applicant.
settings.ticketInitialMessagePlaceholder: Welcome! A moderator will review your application shortly.
settings.ticketInitialMessageHint: Use {discordId} to mention the user and {username} for their name.

configPage.allowModeratorAccess: Allow moderators to access the Applications section
configPage.moderatorNotificationsDescription: Overview of which moderators receive notifications for each flow.
configPage.archiveCleanupDescription: Manually trigger cleanup of archived applications past their retention period. This also runs automatically daily.

settings.communityDescription: Configure community name, invite link, and default language.
settings.discordInviteCodeDescription: The invite code from your Discord server (not the full URL).

displayNameTemplate.title: Display Name Template
displayNameTemplate.description: Define the fields that make up a member's display name. Fields are joined with ' | '.
displayNameTemplate.saveError: Failed to save display name template.

settings.customFieldsDescription: Define custom profile fields for your community.
settings.customFieldModalSubtitle: Configure the field type, permissions, and display settings.
settings.customFieldDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom field?
settings.moderationRightsDescription: Configure which additional areas moderators can access.
settings.modRightDeleteUsersDesc: Allow moderators to delete users from the community.
settings.modRightManageApplicationsDesc: Allow moderators to manage application flows and review applications.
settings.modRightCommunitySettingsDesc: Allow moderators to access community settings.
settings.modRightDesignDesc: Allow moderators to access the design/theme settings.
settings.modRightAppsDesc: Allow moderators to manage installed apps.
settings.modRightDiscordRolesDesc: Allow moderators to configure Discord role sync.
settings.modRightLandingPageDesc: Allow moderators to edit landing page content.
settings.modRightAppsAreaDesc: Allow moderators to access the Apps area.
settings.modRightCustomFieldsDesc: Allow moderators to access and manage custom fields.
settings.modRightPermissionsDesc: Allow moderators to access the permissions settings.
settings.tagDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the tag "{name}"? It will be removed from all profiles.

settingsFiles.title: Media Storage
settingsFiles.notConfiguredDescription: All media is currently stored locally inside the container. This causes several issues:
settingsFiles.warningLoss: Media is lost on container restarts
settingsFiles.restartHint: After configuring, restart the Hub: docker compose restart hub
settingsFiles.purgeWarning: This will permanently delete ALL files in the bucket. This cannot be undone!

bulk.deleteWarning: You are about to delete {count} members. This action cannot be undone.
bulk.confirmPrompt: Enter the number of members to delete ({count}) to confirm.

membershipSettings.title: Membership
membershipSettings.description: Configure how users join and how member data is maintained.
membershipSettings.applicationsRequiredHelp: When disabled, the applications section is hidden and Discord members can log in directly without applying.

autoLogin.title: Auto-Login Settings
autoLogin.defaultRole: Default community role for new members
autoLogin.defaultRoleHelp: New auto-login users receive this community role.
autoLogin.requiredDiscordRole: Required Discord role to log in
autoLogin.requiredDiscordRoleHelp: Only members with this Discord role can log in. Leave empty to allow all guild members.

autoSync.title: Automatic Synchronization
autoSync.enabledHelp: Periodically imports and updates users from Discord based on role mappings.

autoCleanup.title: Automatic Cleanup
autoCleanup.enabledHelp: Periodically removes users who no longer meet the configured conditions.
autoCleanup.conditionsHelp: Users matching the configured conditions will be removed.
autoCleanup.perRoleHelp: Configure cleanup rules individually per permission role. Superadmins and admins are always protected.
autoCleanup.roleWhitelist: Protected Discord roles (not removed during cleanup)
autoCleanup.roleWhitelistHelp: These Discord roles will not be removed from users during cleanup.
autoCleanup.protectModeratorsHelp: Superadmins and admins are always protected.
